Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Short description: Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

Description:
Order now to be ready for the Launch on December 15, 2024!

Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

Now available in three convenient sizes—12″, 14″, and 16″—there’s a Columbia Mud Pan perfect for any project. The mud pans are sold in packs of 6 to dealers, but you have the flexibility to sell them individually to your customers.

Lifetime Warranty:

We stand by the quality and craftsmanship of our products. Each Columbia Mud Pan is backed by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you can rely on it for years of hard work.

Key Features:

  • Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel: Engineered for strength and longevity, this mud pan resists wear and tear for reliable, long-term use.
  • Watertight Laser-Welded Seams: Prevents leaks, even under heavy-duty conditions, for consistent performance.
  • Comfortable Grip: Tapered ends and sides provide a secure, ergonomic hold for better control and comfort.
  • Straight Edges: Ideal for wiping joint knives clean, ensuring a mess-free and efficient work process.
  • Complimentary Rubber Grip: Every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a FREE soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use—adding even more value to this already premium tool.
  • Available in 12″, 14″, and 16″ Sizes: Choose the right size for your specific needs and project requirements.

The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.

Short description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no…
Description:
Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

One of the standout features of the Sabre Smoothing Blades is their remarkable weight—around 60% lighter than the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades—making them easier to maneuvre and control. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

FEATURES:

  • 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″
  • Works with by hand or with the Sabre Claw Adapter (SBC) adaptor for the Sabre Pole (SBP)
  • Hardened Stainless Steel Blade: Durable and ultra-abrasion resistant for long-lasting performance.
  • Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Designed to minimise marks and imperfections.

Description:
The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is the world’s lightest automatic taper. Weighing only 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than other tapers on the market. This significant weight reduction helps to decrease worker fatigue, making it easier to handle and use for extended periods. Innovative Carbon Fiber Design The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is constructed from carbon fiber, which makes both the main tube and the control tube incredibly durable. Carbon fiber is a material that won’t dent and remains temperature-neutral. This means no more dealing with cold tubes in winter or hot tubes in summer, providing consistent performance year-round. Advanced Features for Efficiency The 07TT-C comes with TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. This feature simplifies the cleaning process, saving you time and effort. Additionally, the taper includes an adjustable brake, allowing you to control the flow of the joint compound easily. The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is known for having the smoothest action in the industry, ensuring a seamless application every time. Versatile Application The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is designed to apply joint tape and compound simultaneously. It works on both flat joints on walls and ceilings as well as internal corners. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any drywall finishing job, big or small. Benefits of the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper - Lightweight: At 5.65 pounds, it reduces worker fatigue. - Durable: Made from carbon fiber, it won’t dent and is temperature-neutral. - Easy to Clean: Features TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. - Adjustable Brake: Allows for easy control of joint compound flow. - Smooth Action: Known for the smoothest action in the industry. - Versatile: Applies joint tape and compound to both flat joints and internal corners. Improve Your Work Quality Using the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper helps improve the quality and efficiency of your drywall finishing work. Its lightweight design and smooth operation allow for precise application, reducing the need for touch-ups and rework. This tool is ideal for professionals who demand the best in performance and reliability. Name: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
Short description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner F
Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings

Name: TapeTech 4" Compound Roller Frame
Short description: TapeTech 4" Roller Cage CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings
Description: TapeTech 4" Roller Cage CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Name: TapeTech MAXXBOX®
Short description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or seco
Description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight you don’t need on the finish coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat. The TapeTech 7” MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 94% more usable joint compound than the standard EasyClean® finishing box (model EZ07TT) and up to 68% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. Step up to the boxes designed to hold and deliver the right amount. Every time. Every box. MAXXBOX®. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints

Short description: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail
Description:
TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail or screw heads during drywall installation. The Nail Spotter's easy clean box design helps fill these depressions and remove extra compound at the same time. This makes the drywall finishing process faster and easier. Key Features A key feature of the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is its hardened steel skid plate. This plate lets the Nail Spotter move smoothly along the wall. It also protects the stainless steel blade from damage caused by nail or screw heads that are not fully set below the drywall surface. Consequently, this feature helps the tool last longer, making it a smart buy for drywall professionals. Handle Compatibility The Nail Spotter works with the XHTT Extension handle and the FHTT fiberglass handle. These handles are sold separately. They give extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach areas without ladders or scaffolding. The extension handle is great for big projects, while the fiberglass handle is a light yet strong option. User-Friendly Design The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is designed to be easy to use. The easy clean box design makes cleaning simple and quick. This is very useful for busy contractors who need to keep their tools in good condition without losing time. Description: The QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound!

Name: TapeTech Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Short description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to st
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound.   Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease.   Versatile Application   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper   - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments.   Conclusion   The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Short description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.
